# Per-page template scoping with embed.FS passed as a function parameter.
# Uses fs.Glob and ParseFS with path.Base/path.Dir — the pattern used by
# applications that pass embed.FS through constructor functions.

check-templates ./...
! stderr .

-- go.mod --
module example.com/app

go 1.25.0
-- assets.go --
package app

import "embed"

//go:embed templates/layouts/*.html templates/pages/*/*.html
var TemplatesFS embed.FS
-- web/web.go --
package web

import (
	"fmt"
	"html/template"
	"io/fs"
	"net/http"
	"path"
)

type OwnersPage struct {
	Title  string
	Owners []string
}

type VehiclesPage struct {
	Title    string
	Vehicles []string
}

func New(fsys fs.FS) http.Handler {
	templates := loadTemplates(fsys)

	render := func(w http.ResponseWriter, name string, data any) {
		t, ok := templates[name]
		if !ok {
			http.Error(w, "not found", 500)
			return
		}
		_ = t.ExecuteTemplate(w, "base.html", data)
	}

	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	mux.HandleFunc("/owners", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		render(w, "owners/list.html", OwnersPage{Title: "Owners", Owners: []string{"Alice"}})
	})
	mux.HandleFunc("/vehicles", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		render(w, "vehicles/list.html", VehiclesPage{Title: "Vehicles", Vehicles: []string{"Car"}})
	})
	return mux
}

func loadTemplates(fsys fs.FS) map[string]*template.Template {
	layoutFile := "templates/layouts/base.html"
	pageFiles, _ := fs.Glob(fsys, "templates/pages/*/*.html")
	templates := make(map[string]*template.Template)
	for _, page := range pageFiles {
		dir := path.Dir(page)
		name := path.Base(dir) + "/" + path.Base(page)
		files := []string{layoutFile, page}
		t, err := template.New("").ParseFS(fsys, files...)
		if err != nil {
			panic(err)
		}
		templates[name] = t
	}
	return templates
}

var _ = fmt.Sprint
-- cmd/server/main.go --
package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"

	app "example.com/app"
	"example.com/app/web"
)

func main() {
	handler := web.New(app.TemplatesFS)
	_ = http.ListenAndServe(":8080", handler)
}

var _ = fmt.Sprint
-- templates/layouts/base.html --
<h1>{{.Title}}</h1>
{{template "content" .}}

-- templates/pages/owners/list.html --
{{define "content"}}
<ul>{{range .Owners}}<li>{{.}}</li>{{end}}</ul>
{{end}}

-- templates/pages/vehicles/list.html --
{{define "content"}}
<ul>{{range .Vehicles}}<li>{{.}}</li>{{end}}</ul>
{{end}}
